overall.description: Cinematic third-person game footage of a character walking through a foggy, snow-dusted mountain forest at night. The journey progresses from open snowy slopes into a narrow rocky canyon and finally into a dense fog-shrouded woodland with atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain slope with scattered conifers

events.description: character moves from open snow field into the tree line at the forest edge
fog density increases as elevation rises toward the mountain pass

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily uphill through snow-dusted terrain toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: snow-dusted mountain incline with patches of exposed rock
sparse conifer trees dotting the mountainside
distant rocky mountain peaks silhouetted against the foggy sky
narrow winding path cutting through the snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide snowy mountain slope at night, with the character walking uphill toward a distant tree line. Sparse pine trees dot the landscape while fog gathers in the valleys below. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches the forest edge, transitioning from open terrain to the woodland boundary.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain canyon trail between rock walls and pines

events.description: path narrows significantly as rock walls rise on both sides forming a canyon
character makes a slight left turn following the winding trail around a rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrow winding path between rock outcrops and dense pine trees in the canyon

entered.detail: steep rock face rising immediately beside the trail
narrow mountain passage between towering rock formations
thick cluster of tall conifer trees lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow mountain canyon where rock walls rise on the right and dense pines line the left. The snow gives way to bare dirt trail as the path winds through the geological formations. Fog drifts through the canyon as the character navigates the winding route, with the camera maintaining a steady follow position.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense foggy forest interior with rocky obstacles

events.description: visibility decreases significantly as fog thickens into a dense mist
character weaves around large boulders obstructing the forest path

agents.ego_description: moving through thick fog among tall pines, adjusting path to navigate around rock obstacles

entered.detail: massive rock formations scattered across the trail
towering conifer trees forming a dense overhead canopy

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into the heart of the foggy forest where visibility drops significantly. The character walks among towering pines and weaves around large boulders that litter the path. The rocky canyon wall falls away as the terrain opens slightly into a wooded grove, though the thickening fog creates an increasingly enclosed atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, snowy mountain slope into a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded forest. It begins by tracking the character uphill across a wide expanse of snow toward a distant tree line, with sparse pines and fog gathering in the valleys below. As the character reaches the woodland boundary, the terrain shifts into a narrow mountain canyon where the snow gives way to a bare dirt trail winding between towering rock walls and dense pines. The scene then opens slightly into a wooded grove as the canyon walls fall away, though visibility drops significantly as the camera follows the character weaving around large boulders. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed as the character disappears into the heart of the forest amidst towering pines and thickening fog.
